sources.title: Megalodon: The Frenzy | Full Movie 2024 | Sci-Fi Action | Killer Shark Movie
sources.description:
The stakes have never been higher when a “frenzy” of five Megalodons, spawn of the original, terrorizes the open ocean.
2023.  Stars: Caroline Williams, Eric Roberts, Jessica Chancellor
